name: Triton Holding Public Company Limited
summary: Triton Holding Public Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the construction and engineering business in Thailand. The company operates through two segments, Constructions Business, and Electricity and Energy Business. It constructs non-residential buildings; and provides land and building rental services. The company also engages in the mining and construction material supply; electricity generation from solar, wind, hydro, biogas, and waste; waste management; sale of radio taps and radio compact discs; and alternative energy resource and mining businesses. In addition, it is involved in provision of directional drilling contract business, which performs works of oil, water, sewer, and gas pipelines, as well as fiber optic cables; management of real estate; film production and distribution; showcasing; radio business; and production of TV programs for pay TV businesses. The company was formerly known as Live Incorporation Public Company Limited and changed its name to Triton Holding Public Company Limited in October 2015. Triton Holding Public Company Limited was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
